title: Sprasnikum! Cultural Connection Resource Guide Now Available
summary: Sprasnikum! In honor of Russian Christmas, we are releasing a project that has been underway for several months in response to Shareholder requests for connections to various cultural resources in the region. This guide on our website includes links to history, arts, foods, language, ANCSA, and book...

title: Welcome our new KUAC Kids Club voice, Theo Perreault!
summary: Outgoing KUAC Kids Club voice Logan Imus and incoming voice Theo Perreault met up for a chat at the KUAC studio last month. The new year brings all sorts of changes, and a big one here at KUAC is the passing of the KUAC Kids Club baton! 2023 sees the departure of the Club’s previous voice-over talen...
